summary: Iteration 169: Tested PDF generation endpoints for invoices, preventivi, and DDT. All 15 pytest tests passed. All PDF endpoints return valid PDF content with proper %PDF- headers. Monochromatic styling confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice PDF (ReportLab): Returns %PDF-1.4 format, ~64KB for typical invoice, monochromatic grey scale colors
Preventivo PDF (WeasyPrint): Returns %PDF-1.7 format, ~33KB, includes condizioni page when company has condizioni_vendita
DDT PDF (WeasyPrint): Works correctly with synthetic data, includes transport details and signature blocks
Preview PDF handles empty lines gracefully - still generates valid PDF structure
Missing client_id properly returns 400 with 'Cliente non trovato' error
Auth properly enforced - 401 returned without valid session token
seed_data_creation: Created synthetic DDT for testing since 0 DDTs exist in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation endpoints fully tested. Invoice PDF uses ReportLab (pdf_invoice_modern.py), Preventivo and DDT use WeasyPrint (pdf_template.py, ddt_pdf_service.py). All PDFs start with valid %PDF- header. Monochromatic color palette (grey scale) is used - no blue/navy colors. Logo scaling is proportional. Condizioni page strips literal quote marks and avoids duplicate signatures.

test_features_verified.POST /api/invoices/preview-pdf: PASSED - Returns 200, valid PDF for complete invoice data
test_features_verified.POST /api/invoices/preview-pdf (NC type): PASSED - Works for Nota di Credito
test_features_verified.GET /api/ddt/{ddt_id}/pdf: PASSED - Returns 200 with synthetic DDT data
